# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app1.example.com
        - https://app2.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Requested-With
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Response-Time
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - security
      - cors

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_name: Api-Key
      anonymous: ""
      run_on_preflight: true
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - security
      - authentication

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 100
      minute: 1000
      hour: 10000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
      limit_by: consumer
      sync_rate: -1
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    tags:
      - security
      - rate-limiting

global:
  plugins:
    - name: cors
      config:
        origins:
          - https://*.example.com
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        headers:
          - Content-Type
          - Authorization
          - X-Requested-With
        exposed_headers:
          - X-Response-Time
        credentials: true
        max_age: 3600
      enabled: true
    - name: rate-limiting
      config:
        second: 50
        minute: 500
        hour: 5000
        policy: local
        fault_tolerant: true
        hide_client_headers: false
        limit_by: consumer
        sync_rate: -1
      enabled: true
    - name: key-auth
      config:
        key_in_body: false
        key_in_header: true
        key_name: Api-Key
        anonymous: ""
        run_on_preflight: true
      enabled: true

services:
  - name: user-service
    config:
      cors:
        origins:
          - https://app1.example.com
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        headers:
          - Content-Type
          - Authorization
        exposed_headers:
          - X-Response-Time
        credentials: true
        max_age: 3600
      rate_limiting:
        second: 200
        minute: 2000
        hour: 20000
        policy: local
        fault_tolerant: true
        hide_client_headers: false
        limit_by: consumer
        sync_rate: -1
      key_auth:
        key_in_body: false
        key_in_header: true
        key_name: Api-Key
        anonymous: ""
        run_on_preflight: true
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https

routes:
  - name: user-endpoint
    config:
      cors:
        origins:
          - https://app1.example.com
          - https://app2.example.com
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
        headers:
          - Content-Type
          - Authorization
          - X-Requested-With
        exposed_headers:
          - X-Response-Time
        credentials: true
        max_age: 3600
      rate_limiting:
        second: 300
        minute: 3000
        hour: 30000
        policy: local
        fault_tolerant: true
        hide_client_headers: false
        limit_by: consumer
        sync_rate: -1
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
